headline: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Recommended To Get “Exposure”
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) is one of Jim Cramer’s Hottest Defense Technology Stock Picks. Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) caters to the defense industry by providing engine components, fasteners, and other items. Its shares are up by 73% over the past year and by 33% since Cramer discussed the firm in April. headline: Is Howmet (HWM) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Howmet (HWM) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Intuitive Machines, Inc. (LUNR) Surges 14.7%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Intuitive Machines, Inc. (LUNR) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
